name: Manchebo Beach
description: Effectively the southern continuation of Eagle Beach with a more peaceful, adults-oriented resort feel.

rockiness.beach: Open powdery white sand — among the widest on the island 🏖️
rockiness.ocean_floor: Sandy floor; shallow for a long distance

characteristics.depth_profile: Very gradual; among the widest beach sections on Aruba — shallow water extends far from shore.
characteristics.access: Free parking; continuous with Eagle Beach to the north
characteristics.facilities: Low-rise resort palapas nearby; fewer commercial vendors than Palm Beach
fun_facts: Effectively the southern continuation of Eagle Beach with a more peaceful, adults-oriented resort feel.
